src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.general_idea: Catch generic Exception instead of FileNotFoundException to handle potential IO errors from InputStream.
Remove unused imports and add static imports for cleaner code.
Use static imports for enum constants to reduce verbosity.
Remove throws Exception from run method since exceptions are now handled internally.
Add email field to customer bootstrap data.
Replace simple list return with Spring Data Page to support pagination and sorting.
src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.human_impl: Changed return type from List<BeerDto> to Page<BeerDto> and added pageNumber/pageSize parameters.

src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.general_idea: Add optional query parameters for filtering beers by name, style, and inventory status.
src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.human_impl: Added @RequestParam for beerName, beerStyle, and showInventory to the getBeers method.

src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.general_idea: Ensure patch operations throw an exception if the target resource is not found.
src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.human_impl: Check if patched Optional is empty and throw NotFoundException if so.

src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.general_idea: Remove the unused import for RollbackException to clean up the code.
Add explicit check for empty Optional returned by service to throw NotFoundException instead of silently ignoring missing data.
Mark the createdDate column as non-updatable to enforce immutability after creation.
Add a one-to-many relationship to BeerOrderLineEntity to track order lines associated with a beer.
Add a many-to-many relationship to CategoryEntity to associate beers with categories.
Add a helper method to maintain bidirectional consistency when adding a category to a beer.
src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.human_impl: public void addCategory(CategoryEntity category) { this.categories.add(category); category.getBeers().add(this); }

src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.general_idea: Add a OneToMany relationship field to map customer to their beer orders.
Use Lombok @Builder.Default to initialize the collection field during object construction.
Mark the createdDate column as non-updatable to enforce immutability after creation.
Explicitly ignore unmapped fields in MapStruct to prevent compilation errors or runtime warnings.
Ignore the beerOrders field during DTO to Entity mapping to prevent mapping errors or unintended behavior.
Add a version field to the CustomerDto class to support optimistic locking or versioning.
Add an email field to the CustomerDto class to store customer contact information.
Reorder fields in CustomerDto to group related data or follow a specific convention.
Changed the CSV conversion method to accept a Reader instead of a File to improve abstraction and testability.
Removed the try-catch block for FileNotFoundException since the caller now provides a Reader.
Replaced specific IO imports with a wildcard import to reduce boilerplate.
